scripts.build:catalog: npm run catalog:merge && npm run catalog:verify
scripts.build:site: npm run build:catalog && node scripts/copy-catalog-to-site.mjs && npm run build --workspace=@nt2-community/catalog-site
scripts.check: npm run catalog:verify && npm run check --workspace=@nt2-community/catalog-site
scripts.dev: npm run build:catalog && node scripts/copy-catalog-to-site.mjs && npm run dev --workspace=@nt2-community/catalog-site
